\section*{Biography}
I am a Ph.D. candidate of Beijing Institute of Technology (BIT), advised by Prof. \href{https://wu-yuwei-bit.github.io/}{Yuwei Wu} and Prof. \href{https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Sl6TV7gAAAAJ\&hl=zh-CN}{Yunde Jia}. I received my Master's degree in 2023 from Beijing Institute of Technology supervised by Prof. \href{https://wu-yuwei-bit.github.io/}{Yuwei Wu} and Prof. \href{https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Sl6TV7gAAAAJ\&hl=zh-CN}{Yunde Jia}, and Bachlor degree in 2018 from Sichuan Normal University. My research area lies at:

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*]
\item Vision-and-Language
\item Multimodal Large Language Models
\item Embodied Intelligence
\end{itemize}

\section*{Education}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*]
\item \textit{2023.09 - NOW},  Ph.D. in Computer Science, Beijing Institute of Technology, Beijing, China.
\item \textit{2021.09 - 2023.07},  M.S. in Software Engineering, Beijing Institute of Technology, Beijing, China.
\item \textit{2014.09 - 2018.07},  B.S. in Computer Science, Sichuan Normal University, Chengdu, Sichuan, China.
\end{itemize}
